summary: Comprehensive testing of insig8 landing page - all sections functional, backend API working, modal form submission successful, mobile responsive design working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All sections have comprehensive data-testid attributes - excellent testability
Early Access API correctly handles new signups and duplicate detection
Framer-motion animations working across all sections
React-fast-marquee integration tools marquee working correctly
Mobile hamburger menu and overlay work correctly on 390px viewport
Nav links correctly scroll to corresponding sections (Features, How It Works, Pricing, FAQ)
Stats counter animation triggers on scroll into view
Pricing cards have proper 'Most Popular' badge on Growth tier
Footer has proper 4-column layout with all links
seed_data_creation: Test emails created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full e2e testing completed. Backend: /api/early-access (POST creates signup, detects duplicates), /api/early-access/count (GET returns count), /api/status (GET/POST). Frontend: All 14 sections render correctly - Hero with Pattern/Signal word-swap, IntegrationsMarquee with tool chips, Problem 3 cards, Reframe pull-quote, HowItWorks 3 steps, Outcomes 6 cards, Stats 4 counters (3-6, 18, 40+, 0), FounderNote video placeholder, CTA, Pricing 3 tiers (Starter/Growth/Enterprise), FAQ 5 accordion items, Footer 4-column. Mobile responsive working. Nav scroll-to-section working. Early Access modal opens from all CTA buttons and submits to API successfully.
passed_tests: Backend: Root API returns Hello World
Backend: Early access signup creates new entry
Backend: Duplicate email returns duplicate status
Backend: Signup with only email works
Backend: Invalid email returns 422
Backend: Missing email returns 422
Backend: Get early access count returns count
Backend: Create status check works
Backend: Get status checks returns list
Frontend: Navigation with logo, links, CTA button
Frontend: Hero section with badge, headline, Pattern word, Signal word, CTA, trust line
Frontend: Floating sphere badges visible around hero
Frontend: Integrations marquee with tool chips (Gmail, Outlook, Fathom, etc.)
Frontend: Problem section with 3 bento cards and signal tags
Frontend: Reframe section with pull-quote and word-by-word animation
Frontend: How It Works with 3 step cards and numbered badges
Frontend: Outcomes section with 6 bento cards in grid
Frontend: Stats section with 4 animated counters
Frontend: Founder Note section with video placeholder
Frontend: CTA section with headline and button
Frontend: Pricing section with 3 tier cards (Starter, Growth, Enterprise)
Frontend: FAQ section with 5 accordion items - expand/collapse working
Frontend: Footer with 4-column layout, social icons, copyright
Frontend: Early Access Modal opens from nav button
Frontend: Modal form has email, company, role inputs
Frontend: Modal form submits to API and shows success state
Frontend: Nav sticky behavior with glass effect on scroll
Frontend: Nav links scroll to corresponding sections
Mobile: Hamburger menu visible on mobile viewport
Mobile: Mobile overlay opens with nav links
Mobile: Mobile menu CTA button present
Mobile: Sections render correctly on mobile
